answers: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) is a global organization of 190 countries working to foster monetary cooperation, financial stability, and sustainable economic growth.
IMF countries ke financial crisis er somoy loan dey, but conditions thake like austerity measures ar economic reforms implement korte hoy.
IMF monitors global economic trends, provides policy advice to member nations, and offers financial assistance to countries facing balance of payment problems.
IMF er kaj holo global monetary system stable rakhা, exchange rates monitor kora, ar member countries ke economic crisis theke recover korte help kora.
